segments.text: You lack time-tested profitable trading strategies and a network of serious traders to help you become consistently profitable
Are reached the next level. Let's fix that right now at the SMB trading summit
2026 you'll learn trading strategies traded by SMB traders and taught
By SMB traders and network with serious traders
You aren't just getting theory from a textbook. You're getting real trades from real traders who make real money
Also two new VIP upgrades are now available
Propast Friday and Propast Sunday have just been released. We're opening the firm's doors
These VIP upgrades will go fast. So please act quickly
Here is exactly what we're putting in your hands. We're covering the full spectrum of the market the day three breakout
Top-I Justin Spiro the 30-minute breakout pattern top-I Garrett Reignant easy money trades
Top-I C-Bride the offside scalp top-I Jeff Holden the broken-wing butterfly
Top-I Seth Freyberg the capitulation fade trade top-I Lance Brightstein and because we know you need to review this at home
Every attendee gets a PDF of these exact trades to study and execute
But it's not just about the charts. We're bringing in the best trading coach in the country Dr. Brett steam barter
He's worked with our traders for decades and he's going to offer live coaching to help you fix your worst habits and scale
Your best ones plus our eight-figure your star SMB trader
Max Dantle is gonna tackle the most challenging hurdle in the business
sizing up if you're stuck trading small this session is your ceiling breaker
I'll be your host opening and closing the day with stories from the desk about why our top guys succeed and what others don't
Now if you want to go deeper we just released two new VIP experiences
Rope past Friday get you lunch at SMB at participation in a live playbook mentoring session
So you'll learn another trading strategy in detail just like we do on our desk
Co-cast Sunday get you bales with Bella at our SMB capital trading office
Where we sit down together and talk shop and learn another trading strategy the Bell Fade trade which I personally teach to you
Look independent traders always ask me where can I meet real traders?
How do I talk to guys like Lancer Max?
The answer is right here
Between the sessions and our all attendee happy hour
You'll be in the same room fucking shop with the entire SMB team
total access
Stop wondering if you have what it takes and start surrounding yourself with people who've already done it
This isn't just a seminar
It's a catalyst for your next chapter of your trading career from all of us at SMB
We created this for you and we look forward to seeing you in New York sign up here. Let's get to work

metadata.title: The strategies we trade. The traders who trade them. (SMB Trading Summit 2026)
